narrative:
Precinct Maumee 2 (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,219 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.4 percentage points.
